description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding shelving unit made of light brown wood or wood-like material. The structure features two horizontal shelves, creating three open compartments of varying sizes, all accessible from the front and back. The sides are solid, while the front and back are open, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements. Its compact size and open construction make it suitable for use as a display shelf, storage unit, or room divider in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages.
description: A light brown, rectangular open shelving unit with three compartments and a minimalist, handle-free design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open compartments and the full rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid side panel and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Back view, identical to the front, with three open compartments visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid side panel and depth.
